meta.description:
Generates all photography for the TAG Aspen/ClearChoice mockup. Reads prompts from the Define Shots node, sends each to OpenAI gpt-image-1, saves the resulting image to /brand/photos/. Triggered manually. Requires an 'openAiApi' credential in n8n.

Usage:
1. In n8n: Settings → Credentials → New → OpenAI → paste OPENAI_API_KEY
2. Open this workflow, click 'Trigger ▶'
3. Images land in /Users/chrismason/Documents/TAG/Mockups/aspen_clearchoice/brand/photos/
4. ~30s per shot, 4-at-a-time batching, full run ~3-4 minutes
